ground_truth.title: Functions - JavaScript | MDN
with: Functions are one of the fundamental building blocks in JavaScript
A function definition (also called a function declaration, or function statement) consists of the function keyword
A function that calls itself is called a recursive function
The arguments of a function are maintained in an array-like object
An arrow function expression (also called a fat arrow to distinguish from a hypothetical -> syntax in future JavaScript)
without: Was this page helpful to you?
